fact_nuggets.text: Thick Fat (Japanese: Thick Fat) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Resistant to Fire- and Ice-type moves. MD T D S Makes the Pokemon resistant to Fire- and Ice-type moves. B S L Conq. Raises resistance to Fire-type and Ice-type moves. MD GtI Reduces damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves. * The Pokemon takes less damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves! * S MD The Pokemon takes less damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves! MD RT DX The Pokemon takes less damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokemon with Thick Fat is attacked by an Ice - or Fire-type move, the opponent's Attack or Special Attack is reduced by 50% during damage calculation, effectively halving the damage the Pokemon takes. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Thick Fat has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokemon with Thick Fat is attacked by an Ice - or Fire-type move, the opponent's Attack or Special Attack is reduced by 50% during damage calculation, effectively halving the damage the Pokemon takes.
Halves damage from fire and ice moves.
